name: helga_delayed_parking
description: Vulnerable elderly customer reporting parking damage three weeks after the fact. Tests the fraud-signal pillar (delayed_reporting) and the 'vulnerable_flag' empathy mode. No third party.
caller_turns: Hello dear, this is Helga Schmidt — am I speaking with a real person?
Oh good. I'm afraid I have to report some damage on my Audi. I noticed it about three weeks ago but you know how it is, I kept forgetting to call.
I think it happened in front of the apartment. There's a fresh scrape down the driver's side door but no broken glass.
No, no other car involved that I saw. No witnesses either, I'm sorry.
I never called the police, was I supposed to?
Yes the car still drives perfectly. Should I take it to my usual garage on Lindenweg?
